product_overview: RECEPTOR PRO is an AI-powered menu designer platform integrating a React frontend with a FastAPI backend and MongoDB database. It enables restaurant professionals to create structured technical cards (techcards) for dishes using AI, manage menus, calculate nutrition and costs, and synchronize data with IIKO restaurant management systems. The platform offers export functionalities, advanced AI-assisted recipe generation, and seamless integration with external services such as OpenAI and IIKO APIs, with robust user authentication and data isolation.
core_goals: Provide AI-driven generation of structured technical cards (V2 techcards) for restaurant dishes to streamline menu design and management.
Enable conversion between creative AI-generated recipes (V1) and strict structured techcards (V2) compatible with IIKO RMS.
Ensure seamless integration and synchronization with external IIKO RMS via API for importing and exporting product and dish data.
Offer comprehensive export options including Excel, PDF, and ZIP archives tailored for IIKO RMS platform requirements.
Support detailed nutritional and cost calculations for dishes and ingredients to assist in menu pricing and compliance.
Maintain strict user data isolation and security with Google OAuth authentication and user-role based access controls.
Provide an intuitive, responsive React frontend with clear user flows, loading states, and modal dialogs for managing techcards, AI functions, menus, and exports.
Facilitate logging, debugging, and performance monitoring to optimize AI generation and mapping processes.
key_features: AI Tech Card Generation: Advanced AI (GPT-4o) powered generation of detailed V2 technical cards including ingredients, portions, article allocation, and auto-mapping ingredients to IIKO catalog items.
IIKO Integration: Deep integration with IIKO Cloud API for importing product catalogs, assigning real article codes, and exporting dish skeleton files compatible with IIKO RMS.
Export System: Multi-format export capabilities supporting Excel (XLSX), PDF, HTML, and ZIP archives containing all necessary export skeletons for IIKO deployment.
Menu Management: Menu creation and management with AI assistance and ability to convert free-form V1 recipes to structured V2 techcards.
Nutrition and Cost Calculators: Automated calculation modules providing nutritional information and dish costing, aiding compliance and pricing decisions.
HACCP System: Implementation of Hazard Analysis and Critical Control Points processes to ensure food safety management integrated into techcards.
User Authentication: Google OAuth integration providing secure login and user session management with role-based data access.
Frontend React SPA: Modern, responsive single-page React application styled with Tailwind CSS managing app state in a monolithic structure with well-defined views and modal dialogs.
Backend API Server: FastAPI backend offering RESTful endpoints for techcard operations, AI generation, export handling, user management, and integrations.
Quality Validation: In-depth validation and quality control of generated and user-submitted techcards to ensure data integrity and export readiness.
user_flow_summary: User logs in via Google OAuth and accesses the main dashboard.
User creates or imports a dish description in V1 recipe form via AI-powered generation.
User optionally converts V1 recipe to structured V2 techcard with detailed ingredients and portions.
AI engine assigns unique article codes and performs enhanced auto-mapping to match ingredients with IIKO catalog entries.
User reviews and edits techcard, nutrition, and cost calculations with UI feedback and loading states.
User initiates export, triggering preflight checks for missing mappings or errors.
System generates skeleton export files (Excel XLSX for products/dishes, PDF, HTML) and bundles in ZIP archive for IIKO RMS upload.
User downloads export package and optionally views AI-generated inspirations, food pairings, and sales scripts via modal dialogs.
User views history of created techcards and recipes filtered strictly by user ID to ensure data isolation.
Throughout usage, system logs key events and errors to backend logs and shows relevant console messages in frontend for debugging.
validation_criteria: Generated V2 techcards must contain all required fields and pass strict validation rules before saving or export.
Automatic article assignment correctly differentiates between system-generated and real IIKO articles with no collisions.
Data queries from the database respect user isolation and do not expose other users' information under any condition.
Export files (ZIP, XLSX, PDF) are verified for completeness and format correctness to ensure seamless import into IIKO RMS.
AI generation endpoints maintain responsiveness with controlled concurrency to avoid multiple simultaneous requests by one user.
Frontend UI states (loading, errors) accurately reflect backend processing status to prevent user confusion or race conditions.
Security measures including OAuth authentication and environment variable management are correctly implemented and tested.
Integration with IIKO RMS gracefully handles API unavailability with fallback mechanisms and appropriate user alerts.
Performance benchmarks around AI generation times, export processing, and database queries meet defined thresholds for smooth user experience.
Comprehensive test coverage and logging exist for critical code paths including AI functions, export processing, and integrations.
